prompt: Describe the complete call chain for handling a user chat request that may use tools, from HTTP entry to tool execution. Write your answer as plain text to the file ate-out/T1-call-chain.txt (create the ate-out directory if needed). Your answer MUST name these types if they exist in the repo: ChatController, AgentOrchestrator, ChatService. Also name how tools are registered for the model (e.g. ToolCallbacks.from, ToolRegistry, or equivalent).
